features.name: 1. 基线与失败测试先行
test_steps: cd plugins/progress-tracker && pytest tests/test_feature_contract_readiness.py -q
cd plugins/progress-tracker && pytest tests/test_feature_completion_state_transition.py -q
cd plugins/progress-tracker && pytest tests/test_progress_manager.py -q -k "readiness or lifecycle or retro or refs or scope"
从 monorepo 根目录复现错误作用域的 /prog-next 或等价 CLI 场景，并固化为失败基线
DoD: 新增与稳定后的红灯测试可重复暴露当前缺口，包括错误 project scope 恢复问题，且不依赖非确定性环境。

features.name: 2. 事务层与并发锁

cd plugins/progress-tracker && python3 hooks/scripts/progress_manager.py --project-root . add-update --category status --summary "transaction smoke" --source manual
cd plugins/progress-tracker && python3 hooks/scripts/progress_manager.py --project-root . status

features.name: 4. 脑裂修复与降级开关
test_steps: cd plugins/progress-tracker && pytest tests/test_progress_manager.py -q -k "reconcile or legacy or disable_v2 or scope"
cd plugins/progress-tracker && PROG_DISABLE_V2=1 python3 hooks/scripts/progress_manager.py --project-root . status
从 monorepo 根目录验证 mutating 命令无 --project-root 时 fail closed
从 monorepo 根目录验证显式 --project-root plugins/progress-tracker 后可继续工作
DoD: 开关来回切换后状态可自愈，2.1 字段不会在兼容模式下丢失，且错误作用域写入会被显式阻断。

updates.summary: 优化 drift prevention feature 映射与文档入口
updates.details: 新增 docs/DRIFT_PREVENTION_P0_STATUS.md，并在 README/readme-zh 增加状态文档入口；更新 Feature 11 文档验收步骤。
updates.next_action: 继续执行 feature 1 基线验证

updates.summary: Feature 1 baseline: monorepo scope red test + recovery regression
updates.details: Added failing baseline test for root-scope /prog-next equivalence and passing explicit --project-root recovery test; validated with targeted pytest runs.
updates.next_action: Keep Feature 1 in-progress until baseline acceptance and downstream fixes are scheduled.

updates.summary: Feature 1 blockers: red baseline accepted but scope preset recovery not implemented
updates.details: Monorepo root daily next-feature still fails without --project-root (new deterministic red baseline). Broader readiness contract tests remain red (missing lifecycle/readiness/retro/refs APIs).
updates.next_action: Decide whether to keep red baseline in main suite or gate with xfail, then schedule implementation features 3/6/7/9 and scope preset CLI.

updates.summary: Feature 2: transaction lock + atomic writes implemented
updates.details: Added cross-process progress transaction lock (progress.lock), atomic file replace writes for progress/checkpoints/history/markdown, and concurrent mutation regression tests to prevent corruption/lost updates.
updates.next_action: Run complete for feature 2 after smoke verification.

updates.summary: Feature 3: schema 2.1 contract backfill + lifecycle mapping
updates.details: Added feature contract defaults backfill (lifecycle_state/requirement_ids/change_spec/acceptance_scenarios), lifecycle transitions in stage/complete/archive flow, and preserved explicit empty contract fields for later readiness validation.

updates.summary: Feature 4 in-progress: scope gates verified, known red baseline still open
updates.details: Verified monorepo root mutating command fails closed without --project-root and succeeds with explicit --project-root. Remaining blocker is intentional root-scope baseline test expecting implicit recovery (still red), plus unresolved --project-root . ambiguity under monorepo root.
updates.next_action: Decide whether to keep baseline red (documented) or implement scope preset/relative-root ergonomics before completing feature 4.

updates.summary: Feature 4: scope baseline closed and --project-root dot semantics fixed
updates.details: Updated project-root resolution to prefer cwd-relative explicit paths (with repo-root fallback), converted conflicting red baseline scope test to fail-closed contract, added explicit --project-root . plugin-root test, and validated scope acceptance commands + targeted pytest suites.
Plan gate recovered with docs/plans/2026-03-16-feature-4-scope-recovery.md; acceptance checks passed (scope + disable-v2 + monorepo fail-closed semantics).

runtime_context.next_action: Run /prog done to verify and close feature 5
